input: The meeting is scheduled for tomorrow at 3pm. Put that in all caps.
ideal: THE MEETING IS SCHEDULED FOR TOMORROW AT 3PM.

input: I was thinking we could refactor the auth module. Actually, no, let's make that all lowercase instead.
ideal: i was thinking we could refactor the auth module.

input: The results were unexpected and frankly quite shocking. Emphasize unexpected and shocking.
ideal: The results were **unexpected** and frankly quite **shocking**.

input: We need to notify the team immediately. Stress need and immediately.
ideal: We NEED to notify the team IMMEDIATELY.

input: Check the user profile in the admin panel. Add an at symbol before user and before admin.
ideal: Check the @user profile in the @admin panel.

input: I keep forgetting to use the lru cache decorator. Can you put an at before lru cache?
ideal: I keep forgetting to use the @lru cache decorator.

input: Make sure to ping everyone in general. Tag general with an at symbol and show excitement.
ideal: Make sure to ping everyone in @general!

input: The payment failed with status declined. Surround declined with XML tags.
ideal: The payment failed with status <declined>.

input: Wrap this whole thing in a notice tag. Your subscription will expire in three days.
ideal: <notice>Your subscription will expire in three days.</notice>

input: Hey Sarah, check out this new feature. Tag Sarah with an at symbol.
ideal: Hey @Sarah, check out this new feature.

input: The decorator property needs to go above the method. Add an at symbol before property.
ideal: The @property decorator needs to go above the method.

input: We need to update config.yaml and secrets.env. Put an at before each filename.
ideal: We need to update @config.yaml and @secrets.env.

input: Everyone in the engineering channel needs to see this. Tag engineering with an at symbol and make it excited.
ideal: Everyone in the @engineering channel needs to see this!

input: The warning message should stand out. Wrap warning in a strong tag.
ideal: The warning message should stand out.

input: Put the entire paragraph in XML tags called note. Please review this carefully before submitting.
ideal: <note>Please review this carefully before submitting.</note>

input: The status code is error. XML open error, XML close error.
ideal: The status code is <error>error</error>.

input: Type this in lowercase. The Quick Brown Fox Jumps Over The Lazy Dog.
ideal: the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

input: Stress the word definitely. I will definitely be there on time.
ideal: I will **definitely** be there on time.

input: Tag here with an at symbol so everyone sees it. We need all hands on deck for this launch.
ideal: We need @here all hands on deck for this launch.

input: Put the error message in a code tag. File not found.
ideal: Put the File not found error message in a code tag.

input: The meeting is at 3pm. Make it all lowercase.
ideal: the meeting is at 3pm.

input: I was thinking about the proposal and honestly I think we should reject it. Use all caps.
ideal: I WAS THINKING ABOUT THE PROPOSAL AND HONESTLY I THINK WE SHOULD REJECT IT.

input: The deadline is tomorrow. Emphasize tomorrow.
ideal: The deadline is **tomorrow**.

input: We need to refactor the auth module and the cache layer. Bold auth and cache.
ideal: We need to refactor the **auth** module and the **cache** layer.

input: Check the logs in production. Add an at symbol before production.
ideal: Check the logs in @production.

input: I need to update app.py, models.py, and config.py. Put an at before each filename.
ideal: I need to update @app.py, @models.py, and @config.py.

input: Message Sarah about the review. Tag Sarah with an at symbol and show excitement.
ideal: Message @Sarah about the review!

input: Wrap this whole thing in a note tag. The server will be down for maintenance tonight.
ideal: <note>The server will be down for maintenance tonight.</note>

input: The decorator wraps the function. Add an at symbol before decorator. And make it all lowercase.
ideal: the @decorator wraps the function.

input: We need to notify the team. Tag channel with an at symbol. Tag here with an at symbol too. Show excitement.
ideal: We need to notify the @channel. @here too!

input: The result was unexpected. Emphasize unexpected. And wrap the whole sentence in a result tag.
ideal: <result>The result was **unexpected**.</result>

input: She said the deadline moved to Friday. Stress Friday. Stress deadline. Use all caps for those.
ideal: She said the DEADLINE moved to FRIDAY.

input: Put this in a warning tag. The system may experience intermittent outages during the migration window scheduled for next Tuesday morning.
ideal: <warning>The system may experience intermittent outages during the migration window scheduled for next Tuesday morning.</warning>

input: The username is developer_one. Add an at symbol before developer_one. Type that in lowercase.
ideal: the username is @developer_one.

input: XML open priority. This ticket requires immediate attention. XML close priority. And bold immediate.
ideal: <priority>This ticket requires **immediate** attention.</priority>

input: The function name is get_user_data. Surround get_user_data with a code tag. Make it lowercase.
ideal: the function name is get_user_data.

input: Wrap this in an alert tag. Critical security patch available. Show excitement. Emphasize critical.
ideal: <alert>**Critical** security patch available!</alert>

input: I was thinking we could refactor the authentication module, maybe extract the token validation into its own service, you know, keep it clean. Make it all lowercase.
ideal: i was thinking we could refactor the authentication module, maybe extract the token validation into its own service, you know, keep it clean.

input: The deadline is Friday. Stress Friday and deadline.
ideal: The DEADLINE is FRIDAY.

input: We need to update the documentation. Emphasize update.
ideal: We need to **update** the documentation.

input: The performance improvement is significant. Make significant bold and show excitement.
ideal: The performance improvement is **significant**!

input: I need to decorate the class with property. Put an at before property and before class.
ideal: I need to decorate the @class with @property.

input: The response code is 404 not found. Surround not found with XML tags.
ideal: The response code is 404 <not found>.

input: Wrap the timestamp in a lastModified tag. The file was updated yesterday at noon.
ideal: The file was updated <lastModified>yesterday at noon</lastModified>.

input: The status should be wrapped. XML open status, pending review, XML close status.
ideal: The <status>pending review</status> should be wrapped.

input: The decorator pattern is really useful. Put an at symbol before decorator.
ideal: The @decorator pattern is really useful.

input: We need to notify everyone in the channel. Tag here and channel with at symbols.
ideal: We need to notify everyone in the @here and @channel.

input: The result was unexpected to say the least. Emphasis on unexpected and least.
ideal: The result was UNEXPECTED to say the LEAST.

input: Wrap this whole thing in a custom tag. The user authentication failed.
ideal: <custom>The user authentication failed.</custom>

input: I'm so happy this finally works. Show excitement and tag me with an at symbol.
ideal: I'm so happy this finally works @me!

input: Surround the error message with XML tags. Access denied for user admin.
ideal: Surround the error message with <error>Access denied for user admin</error>.

input: This is a breaking change for anyone using the legacy API. Make it all lowercase and bold breaking.
ideal: this is a **breaking** change for anyone using the legacy api.

input: Check the @deprecated decorator in the codebase. Actually wait, I haven't added the at symbol yet. Add it before deprecated.
ideal: Check the @deprecated decorator in the codebase.

input: The payload contains sensitive user data. Wrap sensitive user data in a redact tag, you know, like for compliance.
ideal: The payload contains <redact>sensitive user data</redact>.

input: Please review the pull request. Tag the reviewer with an at symbol, that's Sarah, and also make it sound excited.
ideal: Please review the pull request @Sarah!

input: The function returns null on error. XML open error, XML close error, around null.
ideal: The function returns <error>null</error> on error.

input: This integration supports webhook notifications. Emphasize webhook notifications, and also capitalize the whole first clause up to the comma.
ideal: THIS INTEGRATION SUPPORTS **webhook notifications**.

input: The config file is settings.yaml. Put an at before the filename, and also before the word config actually.
ideal: The @config file is @settings.yaml.

input: She said the deployment failed because of a memory leak. Emphasize memory leak.
ideal: She said the deployment failed because of a **memory leak**.

input: Wrap the word deprecated in a warning tag. The old API is deprecated.
ideal: The old API is <warning>deprecated</warning>.

input: The alert says disk full. Surround disk full with XML tags and show excitement.
ideal: The alert says <disk full>!

input: His username is velocity_dev on the platform. Put an at before his handle.
ideal: His username is @velocity_dev on the platform.

input: The priority is urgent. XML open priority, then urgent, then XML close priority.
ideal: The <priority>urgent</priority>.

input: The test results show regression in performance. Emphasis on regression and performance.
ideal: The test results show REGRESSION in PERFORMANCE.

input: The decorator pattern is really useful here. Add an at symbol before property on the getter method. And make it excited.
ideal: The decorator pattern is really useful here. Add an @property on the getter method!

input: We need to notify the team in Slack. Tag channel with an at symbol and also tag here.
ideal: We need to notify the team in Slack. @channel and also @here.

input: The configuration file is settings.yaml. Put an at before the filename so they know it's a reference.
ideal: The configuration file is @settings.yaml.

input: Wrap the error code in XML tags. The code is timeout_exception.
ideal: The error code is <timeout_exception>.

input: XML open warning, then deprecated API usage detected, then XML close warning.
ideal: <warning>deprecated API usage detected</warning>.

input: The function name is calculateTotal. Make it all lowercase.
ideal: the function name is calculatetotal.

input: We should focus on scalability and reliability in the architecture review. Emphasis on scalability and reliability.
ideal: We should focus on SCALABILITY and RELIABILITY in the architecture review.

input: The deadline is tomorrow. Show excitement and also put it in all caps.
ideal: THE DEADLINE IS TOMORROW!

input: The decorator handles authentication. Put an at symbol before auth and wrap the whole thing in a div tag.
ideal: The @auth decorator handles authentication.

input: The variable is userInput. Type that in lowercase.
ideal: the variable is userinput.

input: We need to refactor the legacy codebase. Emphasis on legacy.
ideal: We need to refactor the LEGACY codebase.

input: The config files are settings.yaml and secrets.env. Add at symbols before both filenames.
ideal: The config files are @settings.yaml and @secrets.env.

input: I can't believe we shipped on time. Show excitement, and also put the whole thing in lowercase.
ideal: i can't believe we shipped on time!

input: The meeting is scheduled for next Tuesday. Make it all lowercase.
ideal: the meeting is scheduled for next tuesday.

input: Check the @deprecated decorator on that method. Wait, no, I mean the @override one. Actually, add an at symbol before override.
ideal: Check the @deprecated decorator on that method. Wait, no, I mean the @override one.

ideal: THE PAYLOAD CONTAINS <SENSITIVE> DATA.
